mapper.select: select log_id, customer_id, status, operate_time, operate_by, reason from sb_customer_status_log where customer_id = #{customerId} order by operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into sb_customer_status_log (log_id, customer_id, status, operate_time, operate_by, reason) values (#{logId}, #{customerId}, #{status}, #{operateTime}, #{operateBy}, #{reason})
